API docs by Redocly

Merlin Web Services (5.3.2)

Download OpenAPI specification:Download

Basics

Merlin Web Services (MWS) is a set of services for providing travel offers, leisure and business. This documentation covers basic usea of data search functions. By using individual functions, we will be able to search, compare and book the tour operators offers.

Remember, that in all requests you must use your credentials for access. If you have no account for MWS, please contact us, to order the product.

The key words "MUST", "MUST NOT", "REQUIRED", "SHALL", "SHALL NOT", "SHOULD", "SHOULD NOT", "RECOMMENDED", "MAY", and "OPTIONAL" in this document are to be interpreted as described in RFC 2119.

Data Operators

We identify data operator by using 3-4 letter codes (field: ofr_oper), they are assigned internally in our system. Each operator means a different connection to external system. Operators can be online or offline.

We do not act as an intermediary in signing the contract.

Current tour operators list is available under following link https://www.merlinx.pl/dostawcy/.

Please contact your local MerlinX support in order to receive the exact locations of these lists for your country.

Become an external data provider

To became external data provider, please go to external provider section, anyway we encorage you to go thru this document in order.

Tokens

This is a effective authentication which allow communication in the further part of the query. Without a valid token You will not receive any results.

Acquire new token

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
login
required
string
expedient
string

Expedient/consultant individual code generated by support

password
string
subsystem
string[0-9a-zA-Z]{0,32}

It is a good practice to have information about origin of request. It will be used for troubleshoting and service usage hints. You can put there information about envinroment or Id of 3rd party developer which received token. This information will be passed to external content provider if supported by supplier.

domain
required
string

For services using direct requests from page, limiting crossite request to specific domain

source
required
string
Enum: "B2B" "B2C"

Source origin, if request came from B2B or B2C portal

type
required
string
Default: "web"
Value: "web"

type of token to create: web - for frontend applicaitons, will autoexpire, can't be invalidated in case of 412 response from search page should generate new token thru backend script. Minimum lifetime is not guaranted, max is 20min.

language
string
Default: "pl"

Expected language of content in response

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/token/new

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "login": "string",
  • "expedient": "string",
  • "password": "string",
  • "subsystem": "string",
  • "domain": "string",
  • "source": "B2B",
  • "type": "web",
  • "language": "pl"
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "token": "string"
}

Trips/Fligts/Hotels

The primary way to get travel offers this include only hotels, charter flights and leisure packages (mostly packages (including dynamic), roundtrips, cruises, etc., but also only hotels offers or flight and bus seats).

Depends on what kind of offers would You like to show and sell on Your portal. To build a search engine you need to follow these steps:

  • start with a searchform, the searchbase request will return all known possible values for specified field types.
  • grouped offer search, you can get results grouped by specified field (default: by hotel)
  • list of offers, which will return offers for the selected hotel

Searchbase

Gives you all known possible values for each search field. You can choose to groups fields for each supplier/subset,

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
Language
required
string
Default: "PL"

Language code

required
object

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/travel/searchbase

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "Language": "PL",
  • "SearchBase": {
    • "Type": "trip",
    • "Operator": "[]",
    • "Transport": "[]",
    • "Accommodation": "[]"
    }
}

application/json

    • "notApplicable": false,
    • "num": {
      • "step": 1,

      }

    • "notApplicable": false,
    • "list": {

    },

    • "notApplicable": false,

      }

    • "location_mountains"
    ],
  • "Base.DatasetInfo": [
    • {
      • "private": true,
      • "name": "string"
      }
    ]
}

AccommodationName autocomplete

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.Operator
required
Array of strings non-empty
Base.ComponentsCombinations.Transport
Array of strings
Base.ComponentsCombinations.Accommodation
Array of strings
Base.DestinationLocation.Id
Array of strings
query
required
string >= 3 characters

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/travel/autocomplete/Accommodation.Name

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
application/json
{
  • "results": [
    • {
      • "Base": {
        • "ObjectId": "string"
        },
      • "Accommodation": {
        • "Name": "string"
        }
      }
    ]
}

Search

Search request can return up to 4 sets of data: filters, reduced filters , grouped offers , and offers

  • Filters: List of possible values for search fields. They use base conditions.
  • Reduced filters: List of possible values for search fields. They use filter conditions on top of base conditions.
  • Grouped offers List of grouped offers. They use filter conditions on top of base conditions, grouped by group field.
  • Offers List of offers . They use filter conditions on top of base conditions + value of group field.
Authorizations:
TokenAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object
required
object
required
object
required
object
object (views)
object

list of possible field excluding filter conditions (using search conditions)

object

list of possible field values (using search and filter conditions)

fieldList
required
Array of strings
Items Enum: "Base.Catalog" "Base.StartDate" "Base.NightsBeforeReturn" "Base.DepartureLocation" "Accommodation.Name" "Accommodation.Room" "Accommodation.Board"
object

require group key to be set

object
object
object

If conditions.results.group.valuekey is selected, it will return only offers for selected key

object

price for field values using all conditions including group key, available only if grouping is enabled

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/travel/search

  • "debug": "string"
}

Details

Details request is used, when the client chooses one specific offer from the list or when we would like to show a specific offer.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.OfferId
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/travel/details

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "result": {
    • "offer": {
      • "Base": {
        • "XCountry": {
          • "Id": "string",
          • "Name": "string"

Checkonline

Check Online

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
actions
required
Array of strings = 1 items

Action to be performed (from offers.online.*.action), currently limited to one action at a time.

offerIds
required
Array of strings = 1 items

List of OfferId's to perform actions currently limited to one offer at a time.

bookingId
string

Booking number (booking swap action only)

includeTFG
boolean
Default: false

Request operator to return prices with TFG (Tourist Guarantee Fund-special support for tour operators) included

Responses

Response Schema: application/json
required
Array of objects (travelcheckonline.item)
Array
action
required
string
OfferId
required
string
required
object (offer)
object (offer.base)
object (offer.accommodationExtended)
Transport.Bus (object) or Transport.Flight (object) or Transport.Train (object) (offer.transport)
object (offer.online)
Array of objects (offer.additionalServices)
object (payment)
debug
string
https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/travel/checkonline

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "actions": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "offerIds": [
    • "string"
    ],
  • "bookingId": "string",
  • "includeTFG": false
}

Checkonline details

Allow to check online status and prices changes of selected offer with chosen services.

Return online checked offer with updated status and prices.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.OfferId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
Array of objects (additionalServiceRequest)

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/travel/checkdetailsonline

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "AdditionalServices": [
    • {
      • "Code": "string",
      • "Assignment": [
        • 0
        ],
      • "DateFrom": "2019-08-24",
      • "DateTo": "2019-08-24"
      }
    ]
}

Insurances

The way to get travel insurance offers.

To build a search engine you need to follow these steps:

  • start with a searchform, the searchbase request will return all known possible values for specified field types.
  • list of offers, which will return offers for the selected search parameters

Searchbase

Gives you all known possible values for each search field. You can choose to groups fields for each supplier.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
fields
required
Array of strings non-empty
Items Enum: "Base.Operator" "Base.DestinationLocation" "Insurance.PersonsCount" "Insurance.StartDate" "Insurance.EndDate" "Insurance.CustomerInformations" "Insurance.CustomerFlags"
Base.Operator
required
Array of strings

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/insurance/searchbase

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "Base.Operator": {
    • "list": {
      • "multiple": false,
      • "values": {
        • "property1": "string",
        • "property2": "string"
        }
      }
    },
  • "Base.DestinationLocation": {
    • "notApplicable": false,
    • "countryandregion": {
      • "property1": {
        • "desc": "string",
        • "regions": {
          • "property1": {
            • "desc": "string"
            },
          • "property2": {
            • "desc": "string"
            }
          }
        },
      • "property2": {
        • "desc": "string",
        • "regions": {
          • "property1": {
            • "desc": "string"
            },
          • "property2": {
            • "desc": "string"
            }
          }
        }
      },
    • "text": {
      • "pattern": "string"
      }
    },
  • "Base.StartDateMin": {
    • "date": {
      • "min": "2019-08-24",
      • "max": "2019-08-24"
      }
    },
  • "Base.ReturnDateMax": {
    • "date": {
      • "min": "2019-08-24",
      • "max": "2019-08-24"
      }
    },
  • "Insurance.CustomerFlags": {
    • "property1": [
      • {
        • "code": "string",
        • "description": "string",
        • "subFlags": [
          • {
            • "code": "string",
            • "description": "string"
            }
          ]
        }
      ],
    • "property2": [
      • {
        • "code": "string",
        • "description": "string",
        • "subFlags": [
          • {
            • "code": "string",
            • "description": "string"
            }
          ]
        }
      ]
    },
  • "Insurance.CustomerInformations": {
    • "property1": [
      • "string"
      ],
    • "property2": [
      • "string"
      ]
    }
}

Search

Search request returns list of offers.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object
object

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/insurance/search

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "conditions": {
    • "search": {
      • "Base": {
        • "Currency": "string",
        • "Operator": [
          • "string"
          ],
        • "OfferId": "string",
        • "DestinationLocation": {
          • "Id": "string"
          },
        • "ComponentsCombinations": [
          • [
            • "string"
            ]
          ]
        },
      • "Insurance": {
        • "TravelPrice": {
          • "amount": "string",
          • "currency": "string",
          • "details": {
            • "TFGIncluded": true
            }
          },
        • "ParticipantsList": [
          • {
            • "birthdate": "2019-08-24",
            • "age": 99,
            • "roomIndex": 0
            }
          ],
        • "StartDate": "2019-08-24",
        • "EndDate": "2019-08-24",
        • "CustomerFlags": [
          • {
            • "code": "string",
            • "checked": true
            }
          ]
        },
      • "Id": "string"
      }
    },
  • "views": {
    • "offerList": {
      • "limit": 0,
      • "orderBy": [
        • "Base.Price.Total"
        ],
      • "previousPageBookmark": "string",
      • "fieldList": [
        • "Base.Price"
        ]
      }
    }
}

Details

Details request is used, when the client chooses one specific offer from the list or when we would like to show a specific offer.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.OfferId
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/insurance/details

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "result": {
    • "Base": {
      • "Price": {

          • "action": "string",
          • "timestamp": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
          • "fieldList": [
            • "string"
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    },
  • "debug": "string"
}

Parkings

The way to get parking offers (corresponding to departure airports mostly).

To build a search engine you need to follow these steps:

  • start with a searchform, the searchbase request will return all known possible values for specified field types.
  • list of offers, which will return offers for the selected search parameters

Searchbase

Gives you all known possible values for each search field. You can choose to groups fields for each supplier.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
fields
required
Array of strings non-empty
Items Enum: "Base.Operator" "Base.DepartureLocation" "Base.StartDateMin" "Base.ReturnDateMax" "Parking.CarsCount" "Parking.PersonsCount"
Base.Operator
required
Array of strings

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/parking/searchbase

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "Base.Operator": {
    • "list": {
      • "multiple": false,
      • "values": {
        • "property1": "string",
        • "property2": "string"
        }
      }
    },
  • "Base.DepartureLocation": {
    • "notApplicable": false,
    • "text": {
      • "pattern": "string"
      },
    • "list": {
      • "multiple": false,
      • "values": {
        • "property1": "string",
        • "property2": "string"
        }
      }
    },
  • "Base.StartDateMin": {
    • "date": {
      • "min": "2019-08-24",
      • "max": "2019-08-24"
      }
    },
  • "Base.ReturnDateMax": {
    • "date": {
      • "min": "2019-08-24",
      • "max": "2019-08-24"
      }
    },
  • "Parking.CarsCount": {
    • "num": {
      • "step": 1,
      • "min": 0.1,
      • "max": 0.1
      },
    • "notApplicable": false
    },
  • "Parking.PersonsCount": {
    • "num": {
      • "step": 1,
      • "min": 0.1,
      • "max": 0.1
      },
    • "notApplicable": false
    }
}

Search

Search request returns list of offers.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object
object

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/parking/search

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "conditions": {
    • "search": {
      • "Base": {
        • "Currency": "string",
        • "Operator": [
          • "string"
          ],
        • "OfferId": "string",
        • "DepartureLocation": {
          • "Id": "string"
          },
        • "ComponentsCombinations": [
          • [
            • "string"
            ]
          ]
        },
      • "Parking": {
        • "CarsCount": 1,
        • "PersonsCount": 2,
        • "StartDateTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z",
        • "EndDateTime": "2019-08-24T14:15:22Z"
        },
      • "Id": "string"
      }
    },
  • "views": {
    • "offerList": {
      • "limit": 0,
      • "orderBy": [
        • "Base.Price.Total"
        ],
      • "previousPageBookmark": "string",
      • "fieldList": [
        • "Base.Price"
        ]
      }
    }
}

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
  • 500
Content type
application/json
{
  • "offerList": {
    • "sortKeyOrderAscending": [
      • true
      ],

Details

Details request is used, when the client chooses one specific offer from the list or when we would like to show a specific offer.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.OfferId
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/data/parking/details

  • 200
  • 401

application/json

Booking

The way to get proper booking form, prepare required data and make booking.

To get proper booking form you need to followe these steps:

  • start with form request, this request will provide booking form with all possible fields, offers current status and price
  • check with formcheck request sending back filled form, that contains choosen options and filled data ie. person codes and bithdates, it will update offers current status and price

Form

Return online checked offer with current status and prices and booking form

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.OfferId
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/booking/form

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json

Form check

Allow to check online status and prices changes of selected offer with filled book form.

Return online checked offer with updated status and prices for sent book form.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Base.OfferId
required
string
Request Body schema: application/json
required
object (bookingFormRequest)

Filled book form to check online.

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/booking/formcheck

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
application/json
{
  • "form": {
    • "AdditionalServices": [
      • {
        • "Code": "string",
        • "Assignment": [
          • 0
          ],
        • "DateFrom": "2019-08-24",
        • "DateTo": "2019-08-24"
        }
      ]
    }
}

Status

Return online checked booking status witg basic data

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
Booking.Id
required
string
Booking.Operator
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v5/booking/status

Response samples

  • 200
  • 401
Content type
application/json
{
  • "result": {
    • "booking": {
      • "Id": "string",
      • "Operator": "string",
      • "Status": "string",
      • "Message": "string",
      • "Price": {
        • "Details": {
          • "Participants": [
            • {
              • "birthdate": "2019-08-24",
              • "code": "ADULT",
              • "amount": "string",
              • "currency": "string"
              }
            ]
          },
        • "FirstPerson": {
          • "amount": "string",
          • "currency": "string",
          • "details": {
            • "TFGIncluded": true,
            • "TFGData": "string"
            }
          },
        • "Total": {
          • "amount": "string",
          • "currency": "string",
          • "details": {
            • "TFGIncluded": true,
            • "TFGData": "string"
            }
          }
        }
      }
    },
  • "debug": "string"
}

Booking V4.1

It functions as a "drop in" replacement for the older v4 format. The response format matches older bookv4 format (existing sources can be reused)

Status

Status is information about the type of reservation.

Status code description:

  • XX Canceled booking
  • RQ Reservation “on request”
  • OP Option reservation with date when the reservation expires
  • OQ offer to pay, non-blocking seats option
  • RF CONFIRMED option reservation
  • OK Firm booking
  • ?? Because of technical reasons, booking status could not be determined
Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
BookingNumber
required
string
Operator
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v4.1/booking/status

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
No sample

Vouchers

Return list of documents provided by the tour operator, may differ depending on the status of the booking

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
BookingNumber
required
string
Operator
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v4.1/booking/vouchers

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<response>
  <status>OK</status>
  <vouchers>
    <voucher>
      <id>0</id>
      <name>documents for the agent</name>
      <link>https://example.com/1.pdf</link>
    </voucher>
    <voucher>
      <id>1</id>
      <name>1,000 pages that no one reads</name>
      <link>https://example.com/2.pdf</link>
    </voucher>
    <voucher>
      <id>2</id>
      <name>kidney donor contract</name>
      <link>https://example.com/blabla.pdf</link>
    </voucher>                                
  </vouchers>
</response>

Display

All booking details with information about travel dates, accomodation dates, status or payment terms.

Status is information about the type of reservation. We distinguish the following codes:

  • XX Canceled booking
  • RQ Reservation “on request”
  • OP Option reservation with date when the reservation expires
  • OQ offer to pay, non-blocking seats option
  • RF CONFIRMED option reservation
  • OK Firm booking
  • ?? Because of technical reasons, booking status could not be determined
Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
BookingNumber
required
string
Operator
required
string

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v4.1/booking/display

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
No sample

Cancel

Cancelling the booking reservation. Cancellation possibility and possible costs, should be checked beforehand was cancel. Please always suggest the terms and conditions of the tour operator.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
BookingNumber
required
string
Operator
required
string
Request Body schema:
confirmCancel
boolean

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v4.1/booking/cancel

Request samples

  • Payload
Content type
{
  • "confirmCancel": true
}

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
No sample

Option change

The ability to edit the reservation. Depending on the tour operator, change the contact details or select other services. In case of change additional services, usually involves an increase the price of the reservation.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
BookingNumber
required
string
Operator
required
string
Request Body schema:
object (forminfo)

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v4.1/booking/optionChange

  • Payload
Content type

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
No sample

Confirms the reservation

To confirm a reservation which is optional at first should be status checked and option date.

Authorizations:
TokenAuth
query Parameters
BookingNumber
required
string
Operator
required
string
Request Body schema:
object (forminfo)

Responses

https://mwsv5pro.merlinx.eu/v4.1/booking/confirm

Response samples

  • 200
Content type
No sample

Search Fields

Searchfield type can be terermined by property name:

Text

text field with optional regexp pattern

pattern
string

regex for field validation

{
  • "pattern": "string"
}

List

Select or multiselect list

multiple
boolean
Default: false
object

for fixed lists, contains key/values

{
  • "multiple": false,
  • "values": {
    • "property1": "string",
    • "property2": "string"
    }
}

Range

range selector: from - to with step

required
object
{
  • "num": {
    • "step": 1,
    • "min": 0.1,
    • "max": 0.1
    }
}

Num

single numeric value

required
object
{
  • "num": {
    • "min": 0,
    • "max": 0
    }
}

Grouped List

2 level list, returns a grouped list presenting a list of objects.

Array of objects (searchbasefield.grouped_listItem)
{
  • "groupedlist": [
    • {
      • "desc": "string",
      • "values": {
        • "property1": {
          • "desc": "string"
          },
        • "property2": {
          • "desc": "string"
          }
        }
      }
    ]
}

Attribute

attribute
Array of strings
Items Enum: "yes" "no" "unspecified"
{
  • "attribute": [
    • "yes"
    ]
}

Participant List

return allowed participant definition forms

Array
One of
birthdate
required
string <date>
roomIndex
integer
Default: 0
[
  • {
    • "roomIndex": 0,
    • "birthdate": "2019-08-24"
    }
]

ComponentCombinations

return allowed combinations of components. We use all combinations of transport and accommodation creating offers depending on the tour operator, each has its own combinations.

The order length transport and stay selected type of vacation depends on the operator. They can be longer or shorter stays.

We distinguish the following types of transport:

  • "transport.flight","accommodation.*" - flight with accommodation
  • "transport.flight" - only flight
  • "transport.onewayflight" - one way flight
  • "transport.train", "accommodation.*" - train ride with accommodation
  • "transport.bus", "accommodation.*" - bus ride with accommodation
  • "transport.bus" - bus ride

The following can be mentioned types of accommodation:

  • "accommodation.hotel"- only hotel stay
  • "accommodation.apartament" - a multi-room apartment of high standard
  • "accommodation.trip" - a road trip, visiting several units
  • "accommodation.holidayhome" - holiday house
  • "accommodation.cruise" - a cruise on the sea or on a rive
  • "accommodation.citybreak" - a trip around a city or visiting several citie
  • "accommodation.childcamp" - events dedicated only for children
  • "accommodation.cruisePL" - a cruise on the sea or on a rive with polish animator
  • "accommodation.pilgrimage" - religious events
  • "accommodation.activetravel" - event with activity, e.g. downhill biking, rafting
  • "accommodation.sanatorium" - stay in sanatorium
  • "accommodation.camp" - camping

We enumerate yet special types of tour require a combination query:

  • Road trip (Objazdówka/ Wyc.objazdowe)- visiting several units, sightseeing

e.g. [["transport.flight","accommodation.hotel"]]

  • 2in1 hotel+hotel - one week we stay in a selected hotel and next week spends in another one, length of day depends from tour operator .

e.g. [["transport.flight","accommodation.hotel"],["accommodation.hotel"]]

  • Z+W or trip+hotel (Zwiedzanie + Wypoczynek) - first week round trip, second week stay in a hotel, sightseeing and leisure, length of day depends from tour operator.

e.g. [["transport.flight","accommodation.trip"],["accommodation.hotel"]]

componentscombinations
Array of strings[ items ]
Items Enum: "transport.flight" "transport.bus" "accommodation.hotel" "accommodation.trip"
{
  • "componentscombinations": [
    • [
      • "transport.flight"
      ]
    ]
}

Full SearchbaseModel

object (searchbase.Base.Operator)

Operator list, usually a 3 or 4 character operator code

object

Price catalog, allows to narrow to a selected offer or catalog of a operator

object (searchbase.Base.DestinationLocation)

Destination, depending of offer type it will be used as Destination Airport or Accommodation location

object (searchbase.Base.DepartureLocation)

Departure place

object

Combination of components

object
Deprecated

Minimum trip start date (including selected)

object
Deprecated

Maximum trip start date (including selected)

object

Minimum trip start date (including selected)

object

Maximum trip start date (including selected)

object

Maximum trip start date (including selected)

object
Deprecated

Maximum trip return date (for offers with transport it will be return departure date)

object

Maximum trip return date (for offers with transport it will be return departure date)

object

Nights between start and return (for offers with transport it will be nights till return departure date)

object
Deprecated

promotion type, allows to select hits of the week, last and first minutes offers

object

Candy - promoted flag ads, e.g. Free Skipass or internet for the free, bonus provided by the operator

object

offers with transfer

object

offer availability

object

Object category, range from 1 to 6, some objects may be without any categories such as apartments or guesthouses

object

Rating of offers

object

Service/Meal type, list IDs are preserved and will not change meaning

object

Main child camp theme, offers dedicated only for children

object (searchbase.Accommodation.ExtAgentAttributes)

List of agent attributes. This feature allows the agent to search only his selected, verified hotels. This solution will help create favorite hotel base.

object

Board type, list IDs are preserved and will not change meaning

object

type of airline selection usually gds/lowcost

object

List of participants, can be Type, Age or BirhDate (for unsupported sources birth date will be calculated to age on StartDateAfter)

object

minimum price

object

maximum price

object

minimum price

object

maximum price

debug
string
Accommodation.Attributes
Array of any
Items Enum: "location_mountains" "location_near_the_slope" "location_exotic_offers" "location_lakes" "location_ski_resorts" "location_city_breaks" "location_directly_on_the_beach" "location_near_airport" "location_near_the_center" "facility_free_wifi" "facility_for_adult" "facility_wellness" "facility_gay_friendly" "facility_barbecue" "facility_home_appliances" "facility_fireplace" "facility_parking" "facility_for_families_with_childrens" "facility_club_hotel" "facility_fitness_or_gym" "facility_outdoor_pool" "facility_indoor_pool" "facility_kindergarten" "facility_water_slides" "facility_facilities_for_disabled" "facility_pets" "facility_internet_access" "facility_air_conditioning" "facility_night_life" "facility_winter_equipment_rental" "activity_bicycles" "activity_animation_for_adults" "activity_sport" "activity_tennis" "activity_golf" "activity_minigolf" "activity_water_sports" "activity_diving" "activity_riding" "activity_nordic_walking" "activity_windsurfing" "activity_sailing" "activity_winter_sports"

}

Attributes

description: Attributes allows to specify the location, facilities or activities of the offer or hotel

object localisation

  • location_mountains - object is situated in or near mountains
  • location_near_the_slope - object is located near the slope (under 100 meters)
  • location_exotic_offers - object is located in an exotic country (outside Europe and Mediterranean countries)
  • location_lakes - object is located onshore or near a lake
  • location_ski_resorts - object is located in MerlinX ski region
  • location_city_breaks - object is located in the city, worth a city break
  • location_directly_on_the_beach - object is located onshore and you can pass from the main building to the beach without cross any road or other obstacle
  • location_near_airport - object is situated under 50 km from the nearest international airport
  • location_near_the_center - object is located in the city center

object facilities

  • facility_free_wifi - in a room or at least one open to the public place in the object free wi-fi access is possible
  • facility_for_adult - object is intended for adults only (no kids under 16)
  • facility_wellness - object has a wellness area
  • facility_gay_friendly - object is friendly for LGBT+ people
  • facility_barbecue - visitors have the possibility to use the barbecue for themselves
  • facility_home_appliances - room/apartment is equipped with household appliances
  • facility_fireplace - room/apartment has fireplace
  • facility_parking - object has his own or nearby public parking (free of charge or extra paid)
  • facility_for_families_with_childrens - object is suitable for families with children
  • facility_club_hotel - chosen club hotels
  • facility_fitness_or_gym - object has a place for fitness or/and gym
  • facility_outdoor_pool - object has a minimum of one outdoor pool
  • facility_indoor_pool - object has a minimum of one indoor pool
  • facility_kindergarten - object has his own kindergarten
  • facility_water_slides - object has at least one big water slide
  • facility_facilities_for_disabled - in object or/and room are present facilities for disabled
  • facility_pets - guests can take pets with them (free of charge or extra payed)
  • facility_internet_access - internet access is possible in object or/and room (free of charge or extra payed)
  • facility_air_conditioning - all or part of the rooms in object have air condition (free of charge or extra payed)
  • facility_night_life - object have a night club
  • facility_winter_equipment_rental - object organize winter equipment rental

object activities

  • activity_bicycles - object has his own or near bike rental and is located near bicycle routes
  • activity_animation_for_adults - hotel organizes animation for adults
  • activity_sport - object enables some sport activities (f.e. soccer, volleuball, table tennis)
  • activity_tennis - object has his own or nearby tennis court
  • activity_golf - object has his own or nearby golf course
  • activity_minigolf - object has his own minigolf course
  • activity_water_sports - object enables some water sport activites such canoeing or swimming on a boat
  • activity_diving - object or his partner organize diving
  • activity_riding - object or his partner organize riding
  • activity_nordic_walking - object is situated in area good for nordic walking
  • activity_windsurfing - object or his partner organize windsurfing
  • activity_sailing - object or his partner organize sailing
  • activity_winter_sports - object is located in area suitable for winter sport activities

Offer

fields returned in offer

Base

General (standarized) fields for the offer regardless of the type

object (IdAndName)
object (IdAndName)
object (IdAndName)
object (IntIdAndName)
XType
string (offer.xtype)
Enum: "Package" "Cruise" "ChildCamp" "Accommodation" "Transport" "Insurance" "Parking" "Car"

Standardized MerlinX type (best fit) describing the offer

object (offer.eguide)

section only returned if the given region has an eguide description

ThumbUrl
string

thumbnail URL

object (offer.base.price)
object (offer.base.price)
object (offer.base.omnibus)

EU Omnibus directive prices per person block, previous price and lowest price per person from set date range

LegacyOfferId
string
Deprecated

legacy id of object, compatible with old version of service (V4:field ofr_id). Incompatible with content available only in V5.

UniqueObjectId
string
Deprecated

legacy id of object, compatible with old version of service (V4:field ofr_id). Incompatible with content available only in V5.

ObjectId
string

Id of object (originate from accommodation if possible), can be used to find alternative offers

OfferId
string

Id of offer, precisely defines offer, can be different in repeated requests

object (offer.base.availability)
Catalog
string
Operator
string
OperatorDesc
string
Duration
integer

total number of travel days (including the day of return)

object (IdAndName)
object (IdAndName)

string <date>
ReturnDate
string <date>
NightsBeforeReturn
integer
ComponentsCombinations
Array of strings
Promotion
string
object (offer.base.candy)
Transfer
string
Enum: "yes" "no" "unspecified"
Refundable
string
Enum: "yes" "no" "flex" "unspecified"
object (extcovidinfo)
InternalData
string

contains additional details regarding the offer for example, pid, roomId or roomSrvId

object (offer.base.datasetinfo)

metadata describing the dataset

BookingConditions
string

Special booking conditions code

Resident
string
Enum: "local" "remote" "no" "noinformation"

required
object

      }
    }
}

XCodeBlock

matched regions, cities, countries, hotel names , unified data of all tour operators.

Explaining:

  • XCountry - grouped countries, unified country name

  • XRegion - matched regions, unified regions name

  • XCity - grouped cities, unified cities name

  • XCode - standardized object id, assigned to the hotel by MerlinX, unified hotel code which was matched. Please do not confuse Xcode with the hotel ID (orginal touroperator's hotel number).

object (IdAndName)
object (IdAndName)
object (IdAndName)
object (IntIdAndName)
{
  • "XCountry": {
    • "Id": "string",
    • "Name": "string"
    },
  • "XRegion": {
    • "Id": "string",
    • "Name": "string"
    },
  • "XCity": {
    • "Id": "string",
    • "Name": "string"
    },
  • "XCode": {
    • "Id": 0,
    • "Name": "string"
    }
}
